title: GAO-09-149 (Condensed Summary): Collection of Medical Evidence in DDS
description: Short internal condensation of GAO-09-149 ('Social Security Disability: Collection of Medical Evidence'), capturing title, date, source URL, focus area (medical-evidence collection processes in DDS), and key recommendation areas (disability-determination process improvements, state DDS performance oversight, processing-time reductions). A few-line synthesis for quick reference, not GAO's own published Highlights.

source.title: Social Security Disability: Collection of Medical Evidence Could Be Improved (GAO-09-149) — condensed summary

notes: Computed: this -summary file is OUR own brief condensation (templated 'Report:' card with Focus Area / Key Recommendation Areas), NOT GAO's published Highlights — so it is synthesis, tiered Computed rather than Authoritative. The 'Date: 2009' in the file reflects the fetch/restatement; the report was published Dec 17, 2008 (temporal_coverage uses the publication year, 2008). For authoritative content see the base (oversight/gao/gao-09-149) and full report (oversight/gao/gao-09-149-full). Narrative, no column schema.
